page_metadata.biotools__summary: This package is intended to identify potential interactions of miRNA-target gene interactions from miRNA and mRNA expression data. It contains functions for statistical test, databases of miRNA-target gene interaction and functional analysis.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This package is intended to identify potential interactions of miRNA-target gene interactions from miRNA and mRNA expression data. It contains functions for statistical test, databases of miRNA-target gene interaction and functional analysis.
